mismatch_notes: OCR drops or normalizes the umlaut/alternate spelling in Guenther/Gunter.
First page contains OCR substitutions such as in1ation and 2t, but the title and source identity are unambiguous.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only.

notes: Core equations are extracted from Markdown Tables 1, 4, and 5 plus surrounding Section 5 text.
The policy-shock term and MMB variable aliases are implementation_cross_check items, not direct paper-side equations.
Exact MMB transformation from price-level contract equations into helper variables was not source-level rederived.
